creator: antoine@FreeBSD.org
text:
Attached patch was tested with  "poudriere bulk -t" on all affected ports:

chinese/oxim
chinese/fcitx
chinese/wenju
chinese/gcin
japanese/im-ja
korean/imhangul
textproc/uim-gtk3
textproc/linux-f10-scim-gtk
textproc/scim
textproc/uim-gtk
textproc/linux-f10-scim-libs
textproc/ibus
